name: Siddhi Acquisition Corp (Cayman Islands)
summary: PART I Introduction We are a blank check company incorporated on July5, 2024 as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar Business Combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this Annual Report on Form 10-K as our initial Business Combination.Although we have evaluated, and continue to evaluate, several potential opportunities, we have not...
